channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The new Pause Point feature in Android 17 wants to stop you doomscrolling — and it's something I'll be turning on right away
item.description: Google has previewed the Pause Point feature coming our way with Android 17, and I like the look of it.

item.title: ‘We see it as the biggest opportunity’: OpenAI enterprise boss on why business users can benefit the most from increasing AI adoption at work
item.description: With enterprise AI adoption on the rise, OpenAI is keen to step in and help your workers and business grow.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, May 17 (game #1574)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, May 17 (game #1071)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, May 17 (game #805)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Rivals season 2 almost had a major 'legal battle' with Chaka Khan's estate over this improvised line in episode 2 — as star claims it 'just slipped out'
item.description: You might miss it, but Chaka Khan's name is briefly mentioned in Rivals season 2 episode 2 — and it almost resulted in a 'major legal battle', according to one star.

item.title: Get Microsoft’s core productivity apps for $130 with Office 2024
item.description: Save 48% on Microsoft Office 2024 Home & Business for Mac or PC and get Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and OneNote for $129.97.
